rag_rules: Fix unresolved property references by removing invalid AGREE clauses that reference AADL properties like HM_Errors or Stack_Size
Resolve type errors in AGREE expressions by ensuring numeric and Boolean types match expected int, real, or bool
Remove guarantees or assumptions that reference invalid implementation-level features or subcomponents in component type scopes
generic_rules: Only reference visible identifiers in AGREE annexes; avoid undefined or package-qualified names not in scope
Ensure all AGREE expressions have consistent types: int, real, or bool
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes, not component type annexes
Delete invalid AGREE clauses when diagnostics point to unresolved identifiers or invalid types
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be inside annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use const, eq, assume, and guarantee with correct scalar types: int, real, bool
Assignments in implementation scope must reference valid output features or declared variables
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL property names like Stack_Size or HM_Errors as AGREE variables
Do not place implementation-level guarantees in component type annexes
Do not generate AGREE expressions with mismatched or <error> types
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and their resolution in model scope
ARINC653 partition and slot allocation details
Component implementation bindings and subcomponent paths in type annexes
